src: An extension of the previous 'Fitness-AI-Coach': a complete web application with real-time exercise recognition and counting. The exercise recognition model achieves 99% accuracy on the test set and 95% and 90% on two additional external datasets. ||  Give a star ⭐ to the repository if it was useful. Thank you! 😊
ja: 前作「Fitness-AI-Coach」の拡張版：リアルタイムの運動認識とカウント機能を備えた完全なウェブアプリケーション。運動認識モデルはテストセットで99%の精度、2つの追加外部データセットでそれぞれ95%と90%の精度を達成。
